title: The 10 Essentials of Forex Trading - The Rules for Turning Trading Patterns Into Profit 2007
note: SRC-098: 176 THE 10 ESSENTIALS OF FOREX TRADING FIGURE 11-1 GBP/USD (One-Hour Chart) The first reason for a consolidation is when the world is waiting for a fundamental announcement and traders stop trading in anticipation of a major market move or breakout after the announcement.
